title: Conjecture 3
context_text: Ossona de Mendez et al. [24] proved the lower bound $\chi_{\Delta}(\mathcal{M}_H) \geq \mathrm{td}(H) - 1$ and conjectured that equality holds. Special cases include $H = K_t$ (proved by Edwards et al., giving a defective version of Hadwiger's Conjecture) and $\mathrm{td}(H) \leq 3$ or $H$ a complete bipartite graph.
paper_contribution: Proves Conjecture 3 for all minor-closed classes with bounded treedepth by establishing $\chi_{\Delta}(\mathcal{G}) = \chi^\star(\mathcal{G}) = \mathrm{tcn}(\mathcal{G}) - 1$ in that setting (Theorem 1); the general conjecture remains open.
paper_title: Clustered colouring of graph classes with bounded treedepth or pathwidth

title: Conjecture 4
context_text: Norin et al. [23] conjectured this as a clustered-colouring analogue of Conjecture 3. They also showed the bound is tight by constructing, for each $k \geq 2$, a graph $H$ with $\mathrm{td}(H) = k$ such that $\chi^\star(\mathcal{M}_H) \geq 2k - 2$, witnessed by a subclass of bounded pathwidth.
paper_contribution: Proves Conjecture 4 for all minor-closed classes with bounded pathwidth by establishing $\chi^\star(\mathcal{G}) \leq 2\,\mathrm{tcn}(\mathcal{G}) - 2$ in that setting (Theorem 2), and shows this bound is best possible; the general conjecture remains open.
paper_title: Clustered colouring of graph classes with bounded treedepth or pathwidth
